strategic_objective: Characterize the stability and origin of strong linear dependencies between feature pairs to understand redundancy and potential bias.
key_checks: Analyze correlation stability of identified feature pairs across temporal segments
Compare dependency profiles before and after preprocessing steps
Assess whether dependencies align with known protocol relationships or data transformations
Evaluate impact of dependencies on effective feature dimensionality and model bias potential
success_criteria: Confirmation of stable or unstable dependency patterns over time
Clarification of whether dependencies stem from inherent network behavior or preprocessing
Identification of redundant features that may bias learning
Evidence supporting or weakening the hypothesis of structural redundancy
router_constraints: preserve feature_scope for all involved feature pairs
